criteria.requirement_adherence: Implementation meets all stated requirements and acceptance criteria (1=misses key requirements, 5=all requirements met)
criteria.code_quality: Follows project patterns, naming conventions, and idiomatic style (1=inconsistent with codebase, 5=indistinguishable from existing code)
criteria.test_coverage: New code has meaningful test coverage (1=no tests written, 5=comprehensive with edge cases)
criteria.iteration_effectiveness: Efficient fix cycles — reads errors, identifies root cause, fixes systematically (1=blind trial-and-error, 5=systematic and efficient)
